name: Fallout RPG
description:
☢️ FALLOUT RPG ☢️

⚡ THE ULTIMATE WASTELAND EXPERIENCE ⚡

Step into the post-apocalyptic world of Fallout like never before. This is a full RPG experience where YOU control everything—your character, your story, your fate.

🗺️ START ANYWHERE, ANYTIME

  • ANY LOCATION - Goodsprings, Diamond City, The Strip, Vault 13, Necropolis, Rivet City, or ANY canon location from Fallout games

  • ANY YEAR - From 2077 (the bombs falling) to 2287+ (Fallout 4 era)

  • ANY TIMELINE EVENT - Experience the Master's Army, NCR vs Legion, Institute crisis, or the Great War itself

  • COMPLETE FREEDOM - Start on a highway, in ruins, outside settlements, or deep in the wasteland

👤 BE ANYONE YOU WANT

🔹 Vault Dweller - Sheltered, naive, seeing the surface for the first time 🔹 Wastelander - Hardened survivor born in the ruins 🔹 Ghoul - Radiation-scarred, possibly centuries old, facing discrimination
🔹 Super Mutant - 8 feet of green muscle, feared by everyone 🔹 Synth - Institute escapee, hunted, hiding your identity 🔹 Raider - Violent, brutal, survival of the fittest 🔹 Soldier - NCR, Brotherhood, Legion, Enclave—choose your faction 🔹 Trader - Caravan merchant, negotiator, traveling the wastes 🔹 Tribal - Primitive warrior, pre-war knowledge lost 🔹 Anything Else - Bounty hunter, doctor, mechanic, scavenger, drifter

⚙️ DEEP RPG MECHANICS

✅ Character Stats - HP, Radiation, Caps, Equipment tracking ✅ Faction Reputation - Your choices affect how groups treat you ✅ Power Armor Done RIGHT - Mechanical exoskeletons with removable pieces, fusion cores, realistic physics ✅ Consequence System - NPCs remember, factions respond, actions have weight ✅ Timeline Accuracy - Technology, factions, and events match the chosen year perfectly ✅ Survival Elements - Radiation, starvation, ammunition scarcity, dangerous combat

🎭 IMMERSIVE STORYTELLING

📖 Lore Accurate - Every location, character, faction, and event from actual Fallout games 📖 Dark & Gritty - The wasteland is hostile, paranoid, and unforgiving 📖 No Railroading - Make your own choices, explore freely, create your own story 📖 Realistic NPCs - People don't trust easily, factions have agendas, violence is common 📖 Power Armor Identity - When fully armored, no one knows who you are—gender, race, nothing

💀 WASTELAND THREATS

☢️ Radiation Zones - Deadly areas that slowly kill you 🦎 Deathclaws - Apex predators, nearly unstoppable 🐛 Cazadores - Fast, poisonous, nightmare fuel 👾 Super Mutants - Brutish, strong, the Master's legacy 🧟 Feral Ghouls - Mindless, numerous, overwhelming 🤖 Robots - Sentry bots, Protectrons, Assaultrons ⚔️ Raiders - Gangs, slavers, Powder Gangers, Fiends 🎖️ Faction Wars - NCR vs Legion, Brotherhood vs Enclave, Institute vs Railroad

🛡️ POWER ARMOR SYSTEM (This bot gets it RIGHT)
creator: Xon-Xina
